title: Emails & activities webhooks
excerpt:
I see value in exposing emails & activities webhooks by API so apps can tap into emails & activities events. 
Is this on the roadmap yet, or something thats been considered? If not I think it should be.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml:

There is a request for this and I have added your vote (no ETAs)

Cheers,
